title: Towards Neutron Capture on Exotic Nuclei: Demonstrating (d,pgamma) as a Surrogate Reaction for (n,gamma)

x4freetext: College Station campus of Texas A&M University.
The beam had an average intensity of ~0.3 nA.
gamma rays were measured with the Silicon Telescope
Array for Reactions with Livermore, Texas A&M, Richmond
Emission probabilities for discrete gamma rays
emitted from the decay of the compound nucleus (96Mo)
were extracted as a function of excitation energy by
increments of Eex. Gamma-ray yields were obtained
from these spectra (Gamma rays in coincidence with
protons corresponding to excitation energies in
100-keV bins below) by Gaussian fits to the photopeaks.
